# CWE-1067 safe: prefix search on indexed column
lang: go
file: CWE-1067-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1067 mitigated: prefix match on indexed slug column avoids sequential scan.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Article struct {
	ID   uint
	Slug string `gorm:"index"`
}

func SearchArticles(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		prefix := c.Query("prefix")
		var articles []Article
		if err := db.Where("slug LIKE ?", prefix+"%").Find(&articles).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"results": articles})
	}
}
